question: Total Kills Over/Under 32.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between LOS and RED Canids in the CBLOL Cup Regular Season, scheduled for February 1 at 11:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 33 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 1, 3:30PM-3:45PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

In the upcoming match between Team Yandex and Team Liquid in the FISSURE Universe Episode 8 Playoffs, scheduled for January 31 at 2:45PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 61 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - February 1, 3:45PM-4:00PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 2, 4PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Pau FC vs. US Boulogne Côte d'Opale: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game between Pau FC and US Boulogne Côte d'Opale, scheduled for February 13 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Pau FC and US Boulogne Côte d'Opale combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue2.fr. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

description:

In the upcoming match between Team Yandex and Team Liquid in the FISSURE Universe Episode 8 Playoffs, scheduled for January 31 at 2:45PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 70 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

question: Red Star FC vs. AS Nancy-Lorraine: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game between Red Star FC and AS Nancy-Lorraine, scheduled for February 13 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Red Star FC and AS Nancy-Lorraine combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market refers to the LoL match between Cloud9 and LYON in the LCS Lock In Group Stage, scheduled for January 31 at 4:00PM ET.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Solana Up or Down - February 2, 7PM ET
description:

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 2, 7PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Al Riyadh Saudi Club vs. Al Khaleej Saudi Club: O/U 3.5
description:
In the upcoming Saudi Pro League game between Al Riyadh Saudi Club and Al Khaleej Saudi Club, scheduled for February 14 at 8:55 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Al Riyadh Saudi Club and Al Khaleej Saudi Club combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

question: Game Handicap: TY (-1.5) vs Team Spirit (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Spirit and Team Yandex in the FISSURE Universe Episode 8 Playoffs, scheduled for February 1 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Yandex" if Team Yandex wins 2 or more games than Team Spirit in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Team Spirit".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: First Blood in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Team Spirit and Team Yandex in the FISSURE Universe Episode 8 Playoffs, scheduled for February 1 at 7:00AM ET:

This market will resolve to the team that secures the first blood in Game 1.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to whichever team secured the first blood prior to stoppage. If the first blood did not occur, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, this market will resolve to whichever team secured the first blood prior to the remake. If the first blood did not occur prior to the remake, resolution will be based on the remade game.

If Game 1 is completed but first blood never occurred, this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market will resolve to "Team Spirit" if Team Spirit win the match against Team Yandex.

This market will resolve to "Team Yandex" if Team Yandex win the match against Team Spirit.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.
